Work: the title character learned military strategy from watching a shrike attack a clam
Work: starts in a post office blaming delays on rain; an employee embezzles; a character steals 300 gold pieces to ransom his lover
Author: Donald Keene published Four Major Plays in English translation in 1961
Author: part of the Genroku triumvirate with Matsuo Basho and Ihara Saikaku
Author: domestic plays belong to the sewamono genre; contrasted with jidaimono historical plays
